title: Senior Revenue Manager at Kesari Tours

jsonLd.title: Senior Revenue Manager at Kesari Tours
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Revenue Manager with drive and ambition, Kesari Tours in Coimbatore is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Kesari Tours:
Kesari Tours is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in HACCP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kesari Tours!
